ReferenceBacklink.description:
One inbound reference, recorded in the inverted index. Backlinks are
*derived* from ``Chunk.references_out`` — never edit them by hand.

label.description: The surface text of the original reference.
label.title: Label

pattern_name.description: Name of the config pattern that fired, if pattern-derived.
pattern_name.title: Pattern Name

source_chunk_id.description: chunk_id of the chunk that emitted this reference.
source_chunk_id.title: Source Chunk Id

ReferenceBacklink.title: ReferenceBacklink

ReferenceType.description:
Kind of edge between a chunk and its target.

See ``docs/schemas.md`` §References for guidance on which type to use.
ReferenceType.title: ReferenceType

description:
Inverted reference index written to ``references_index.json``.

Phase 3 (``resolve_references``) emits this after assembling
``Chunk.references_out`` on every chunk. Backlinks are *not* attached
to chunks themselves; they live here so the source of truth for each
edge stays on the emitting chunk.

by_target.description: Map from target chunk_id to the list of inbound references. Answers 'what cites paragraph 2.4?'
by_target.title: By Target

external_citations.description: Map from normalised external_id (e.g. 'BS-EN-13501-1:2018') to the chunk_ids that cite it. Answers 'which paragraphs cite this standard?'
external_citations.title: External Citations

unresolved_internal.description: Internal references whose target couldn't be resolved. Each one is a validation-rate miss; the list is bounded by the sample size in the validation report, not here.
unresolved_internal.title: Unresolved Internal

title: ReferencesIndex
